calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove Up Hearing And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Patrick J. Suter, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Pacific Resources Setevenson, Inc., a California corporation.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Enterprise Media Holdings, Inc. dba Ziff Davis Enterprise.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Carol M Miles sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Defendant ENTERPRISE MEDIA HOLDINGS, INC. dba ZIFF DAVIS ENTERPRISE is ordered to pay Plaintiff the amount of $209,404.31 for all sums owed pursuant to the breached written lease agreement between Defendant and Plaintiff. Defendant ENTERPRISE MEDIA HOLDINGS, INC., dba ZIFF DAVIS ENTERPRISE is further ordered to pay Plaintif its costs in the amount of $1,160.91 for a Total Judgment in the amount of $210,565.22.
Judgment signed in open court.

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
